assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can complete Grafana Cloud signup.
No Grafana Cloud account, stack, data source, collector, or monitored host exists yet.

developer_goal: Create a Grafana Cloud account and view a first telemetry signal in Grafana Cloud.

first_success.outcome: A first real or connected data signal is visible in Grafana Cloud for the selected connect/send route.
first_success.observable_signal: For the Linux integration candidate, recent metrics for the named host appear on the Nodes dashboard.

route_selection.surface: Grafana Cloud Get started and Connections integrations
route_selection.rule: Select the shortest complete account-to-first-signal route only after one connect-or-send architecture is fixed.

candidates.name: Send Linux host metrics via Grafana Alloy integration
candidates.reason: Complete documented integration path, but Get started begins with multiple connect/send options and OS peers.

candidates.name: macOS or Windows OS integrations
candidates.reason: Official integration quickstart states these are installed similarly to Linux and are peer OS routes.

candidates.name: Connect externally managed data source
candidates.reason: Peer architecture that visualizes external data without sending into Grafana-managed storage.

candidates.name: Explore demo data
candidates.reason: Avoids a real telemetry source and represents a learning outcome rather than the developer's systems.

required_path.action: Create a free Grafana Cloud account and open the Cloud stack.

required_fields.label: Account creation method (SSO provider or email route)
required_fields.notes: Public create-user page exposes Google, GitHub, Microsoft, and Amazon SSO plus Create my account.

required_fields.label: Terms of Service / Master Services Agreement / Privacy Policy acknowledgement
Email or SSO identity fields beyond the visible SSO buttons
required_fields.notes: Create-account docs say follow the instructions without enumerating email/password controls.

required_path.observable_result: The developer can access the Cloud Account Portal and a Grafana Cloud stack.

required_path.action: Choose whether to connect externally managed data or send telemetry into Grafana Cloud, then complete that route to a first visible signal.
required_path.observable_result: The selected route shows a first dashboard or explore signal.

prerequisites.description: For the Linux integration candidate: terminal and admin access on a Linux host with outbound HTTPS to *.grafana.net.

external_gates.description: SSO or identity-provider authorization if the developer uses a social signup option.
Host administrator privileges are required to install Grafana Alloy for OS integrations.

unavoidable_waits.description: After Alloy starts, the first scrape interval must elapse before the Nodes dashboard is populated.

platform_outcomes.description: Account creation starts a 14-day unlimited trial that can transition to the free-forever plan.
OS integrations install Grafana Alloy and provision preconfigured dashboards such as Nodes.

excluded.reason: Documentation is evidence, not a product action.
Officially presented as an alternative that does not send the developer's telemetry.

sources.title: Get started in Grafana Cloud
evidence_supported: Connect externally managed data vs send data branches

sources.title: Get started with monitoring using an integration
Create a Grafana Cloud account
evidence_supported: Create free account steps without field enumeration

uncertainties.question: Which Grafana Cloud data architecture and source should define first success?
uncertainties.impact: Credentials, collector install, firewall rules, waits, and dashboards all change across connect vs send and across integrations.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A corpus choice of one connect/send route and OS/integration, plus a cold-account walkthrough to the first dashboard signal.

uncertainties.question: What exact non-SSO email signup fields does the current create-user form require?
uncertainties.impact: Required field counts cannot be finalized from the partially observed public page.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated capture of the email/password path on https://grafana.com/auth/sign-up/create-user.
